pre_deploy_blocking: Apply migration 20260501000001_retention_audit_log.sql BEFORE deploying the Edge Function (Edge Function writes to this table on first run)
Set RETENTION_TICK_SECRET env var in Supabase Edge Function environment (non-empty string)
Set RETENTION_TICK_SECRET as Cloudflare Worker secret: wrangler secret put RETENTION_TICK_SECRET
Set SUPABASE_FUNCTIONS_URL as Cloudflare Worker secret: wrangler secret put SUPABASE_FUNCTIONS_URL
verification_queries: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'retention_audit_log'; — expect 1 row
\d public.retention_audit_log — verify 8 columns (id, run_id, artefact, rows_affected, started_at, completed_at, error, skipped)
SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename = 'retention_audit_log'; — expect 3 indexes (PK + 2 named)
SELECT count(*) FROM public.retention_audit_log; — expect 0 (before first run)
monitoring_focus: Check Cloudflare Worker logs at 03:05 UTC for [retention-cron] responded 200
Check retention_audit_log after first run: SELECT count(*) should be 47
Watch for [HEARTBEAT_MISS] in Edge Function logs if no run completes
